title: Education Outreach
description: Ames Laboratory's outreach programs are designed to provide promote STEM education and career opportunities to Iowa children grades K-12.
text:
STEM Fest is a one-day annual event held on the Iowa State University campus. Geared towards elementary aged kids, this event gives kids of all ages a chance to learn about Science, Technology, Engineering and Math (STEM) through hands-on activities provided by campus departments, student organizations, and companies.
STEM Rising is the U.S. DOE's initiative to inspire, educate, and spark an upwards trajectory to lifelong success in STEM through sharing of programs, resources, competitions, events, internship opportunities and more.
